data_description.device: The PowerShades device to set up, discovered on your network.

manual.title: Connect to a PowerShades device
manual.description: Enter the IP address of your PowerShades device.

data_description.ip: The IP address of your PowerShades device.

discovery_confirm.title: Discovered PowerShades device
discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name} ({ip})?

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure PowerShades device
reconfigure.description: Update the IP address if it has changed (e.g. after a DHCP reassignment).

data_description.ip: The new IP address of your PowerShades device.

error.cannot_connect: The device did not respond. Check the IP address and make sure the shade is awake.
error.wrong_device: The device at this IP address is a different shade than the one configured here
error.same_ip: This is already this shade's configured IP address

abort.cannot_connect: The device did not respond to a PowerShades probe

cannot_connect.title: {name} is not responding
cannot_connect.description:
Home Assistant could not connect to the PowerShades shade "{name}" at {ip}.

Make sure the shade is powered on and connected to the network, then reload the integration. If its IP address has changed, open the device's PowerShades entry, select **Reconfigure** and enter the new IP address.

entry_not_loaded.message: The PowerShades config entry for {entity_id} is not loaded.

invalid_shade_name.message: Shade name must be 1-50 ASCII characters.

command_not_acknowledged.message: Shade at {ip_address} did not acknowledge the command.

rename_not_confirmed.message: Shade at {ip_address} did not confirm its new name.

rename_empty_name.message: Shade at {ip_address} returned an empty name.

toggle_shade.name: Toggle shade
toggle_shade.description: Toggles the shade between open and closed positions (stops it if moving).

set_upper_limit.name: Set upper limit
set_upper_limit.description: Sets the upper limit (fully open position) for a PowerShades device.

set_lower_limit.name: Set lower limit
set_lower_limit.description: Sets the lower limit (fully closed position) for a PowerShades device.

clear_limits.name: Clear limits
clear_limits.description: Clears both upper and lower limits for a PowerShades device.

step_up.name: Step up
step_up.description: Moves the motor up one step (for trimming limits).

step_down.name: Step down
step_down.description: Moves the motor down one step (for trimming limits).

jog_up.name: Jog up
jog_up.description: Moves the shade up continuously until it reaches a limit or is stopped (useful when setting limits).

jog_down.name: Jog down
jog_down.description: Moves the shade down continuously until it reaches a limit or is stopped (useful when setting limits).

set_shade_name.name: Set shade name
set_shade_name.description: Renames a PoE shade on the device itself; the Home Assistant device name is updated to match.

name.name: Name
name.description: The new shade name (1-50 ASCII characters).
